name: Radiohead
bio: Radiohead's catalog monetizes through deep listener loyalty, critical status, and songs that remain central to alternative-rock playlists.
notable_for: Art-rock experimentation, cult loyalty, and one of the strongest alternative catalogs of the modern era.
career_highlight: Their songs continue to earn through a combination of classic hits, album-driven listening, and long-tail discovery.
revenue_drivers: Deep catalog listening supports steady streaming income.
Classic tracks remain central to alternative and mood playlists.
Prestige catalog status helps keep the band relevant for long-term licensing.
